title: Los 120, cafetales de la poesía
overview: In 1985, 120 young Argentinians traveled to the Nicaraguan jungle to pick coffee in support of the Sandinista Revolution. Thirty years later, four of them decided to retrace their steps, searching for the traces left by their time in this country.
